Shift from AI-assisted coding to AI-assisted delivery. | Introducing IBM Concert platform: Closing the gap between insight and action | IBM Data Gate for Confluent: Turning Z data into real-time action | Introducing IBM Sovereign Core, designed to help organizations build and operate AI-ready sovereign environments and verify their control | Smarter business. As an early user of Bob, the team benefited from architecture‑aware guidance aligned with existing design patterns and internal libraries. | faster delivery, completing a full Java uplift in ~3 days as compared to the earlier ~30 days | engineering hours preserved, eliminating manual refactoring and freeing teams for higher value work
integration resilience | integration resilience: Integration and Resilience Software | IBM | IBM integration and resilience software connects, protects and strengthens application reliability across hybrid environments to reduce risk and downtime. | Integration and resilience software | Integration and Resilience Software | IBM | 15IGO - Automation Platform > 17UO2 - Technology Business Management > 20APO - Observability Portfolio"/> | Integration and resilience software | Integration and resilience software | Build a connected, resilient foundation for the agentic enterprise | Use AI to turn your IT stack into a growth driver | The agentic enterprise starts with a tech stack built for AI. To put agents to work across operations, you need a secure, connected foundation that integrates hybrid cloud, applications, data and networks. We help IT teams orchestrate intelligent automation at scale—enabling AI to anticipate issues, optimize performance and drive outcomes in real time. The result is greater resilience, faster innovation and IT that drives measurable business growth. | Unlock reliable, end‑to‑end performance | Enterprise integration of agentic AI | Accelerate AI adoption by using hybrid data and integration to run agents and models across fragmented IT stacks. | Automation that continuously identifies, prioritizes and resolves risks before users or auditors ever see them.​ | Automation that connects detection to remediation to sustain resilience and performance.​ | Streamline and scale asset and facility operations while unifying fragmented assets, work orders and inventory data. | Java™ application modernization | Modernize faster, cut vendor dependency and strengthen resiliency—maintaining uptime across complex hybrid estates. | AI-driven, mainframe resilience

technology platform.html | Technology platform: SAP Business Technology Platform | SAP | SAP BTP empowers teams with agentic AI-enabled development, automation, integration, data, and analytics across SAP applications and beyond. | SAP Business Technology Platform | SAP Business Technology Platform | SAP | SAP Business Technology Platform | SAP Business Technology Platform Overview | SAP Business Technology Platform | SAP Business Technology Platform capabilities are now a core part of SAP Business AI Platform to build, integrate, manage, and run enterprise AI agents, apps, and workflows. | Powering applications, data, and AI to move your business forward | SAP BTP is a platform engineered to integrate, automate, extend, and build AI-supported business applications and processes across your enterprise. | Integrate and extend business applications faster | Connect systems and processes across the enterprise, create clean core compliant extensions, while safeguarding your data, and accelerate time to value with prebuilt integrations and workflows. | Create business-relevant apps with all your data | Effortlessly integrate data with SAP Business Data Cloud to build smarter applications and develop reliable AI solutions grounded in up-to-date business context. | Innovate and accelerate with AI | Accelerate every phase of development with AI coding grounded in your business context and AI agents that automate real business processes. | The value of SAP BTP across multiple lines of business | Watch how SAP BTP empowers CIO across the enterprise | Built for business applications | SAP BTP is optimized for all your business processes across SAP and third-party applications and has a projected three-year ROI of 516 percent. 1 | Accelerate time to value with prebuilt integrations
ai platform.html | AI platform: SAP Business AI Platform | Build and Govern Agentic AI | SAP | See how SAP Business AI Platform combines development, integration, data context, and governance to deploy, manage, and scale AI agents across the enterprise. | SAP Business AI Platform | SAP Business AI Platform | Build and Govern Agentic AI | SAP | SAP Business AI Platform combines deep process context, unified data, and purpose-built models with enterprise governance, so you can build and integrate AI that understands your business—not just your prompts. | What is SAP Business AI Platform? | SAP Business AI Platform is an enterprise AI foundation that brings together AI, data, process context, and governance, so organizations can build, integrate, scale, and run AI that delivers real business impact. | An enterprise AI platform built for your business | SAP Business AI Platform unifies deep business process context, trusted data, and enterprise-grade connectivity and governance. The result—AI agents and applications that understand how your business runs and scale safely across your organization.​ | Build AI agents, apps, and workflows grounded in business context and connected to all your key systems. | Give AI a complete understanding of your organization, including the data, models, business policies, relationships, and logic

companies.name: WHERE AM I - See My Location Now on Google Maps
companies.shortDescription:
WHERE AM I - See My Location Now on Google Maps | Where am i right now? Our app accurately shows your current location on Google Maps. Get your address and coordinates. Share your location in just 1 click! | WHERE AM I | WHERE AM I - See My Location Now on Google Maps | Wondering where am I right now ? Our Where am I app shows your current location on the map below or Google Maps and helps you find your coordinates and your location address. | Your location address will include: your country, your state when in the USA, city, zipcode, street name and street number. | This where am I map is static and is centered around your location at the time of the page load. You can also track your live location or find out your IP location . | Allow current location access to proceed | You can share your current location by sending the following "where am I" link. We've also added 2 quick buttons to send your current location now by text message or by email. The SMS button is compatible with any mobile device (iPhone, Android, etc.). | What is My Location on iPhone? | If you are visiting this page on an iPhone or on iPad, make sure your browser has been granted access to your location: Official Apple support . | If you are using an Android device, here is the link to make sure your browser has been granted access to your location: Official Google support .
about | About: where-am-i.co | About | About where-am-i.co, my journey to the best geolocation website on the internet. | About where-am-i.co | My name is Thomas Aunay, I have an engineering background and I started developing map-related websites in 2010. | Around 2015, I was working on a big project and created the current where am I tool as an add-on — something extra on a lower-level page. That page was still a work-in-progress when traffic started building up significantly, to my surprise. | Looking back, I believe it must've been due to its core practicality, usefullness and to the accuracy of the APIs which were used. In any case, its success led me to rebuild it as a standalone location website. | I have kept improving the site since then. It has been a challenging journey. With internet constantly evolving, I put a lot of time and efforts into finding the right instruments and securing sustainable relationships with new partners. I feel this is the best version of any where am I tool available out there and I hope you'll appreciate its speed and accuracy. | Don't hesitate to contact me about where-am-i.co or any other map-related subject as this is something I'm truly passionate about.
